box_guarantees._source: pokemoncard.co.kr/card/447 product metadata + https://pokemon-infomation.com/pull-rates-darkfantasma/ Japanese 500BOX aggregate. Box model: K 1, RR 4-5, RRR 2-3, CHR 3, SR/CSR/HR/UR 1-2; Pokemon SR 40%, Support SR 25%, CSR 10%, Pokemon HR 10%, Support HR 10%, UR 10%, 2-hit box about 10%. Korean official pull rates are unpublished.

_notes: S10a. 한국판 공식 봉입률은 비공개. 일본판 500BOX 실측을 한국판 소드&실드 강화 확장팩 모델에 준용. CHR/CSR은 공식 rarity로 분리.
